entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet

[DQC.US.0204.10705] The concept VIVK:PropertyPlantAndEquipmentsEstimatedUsefulLives with a value of Lesser of the lease term or estimated useful life has been used with the axis FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis and the member us-gaap:LeaseholdImprovementsMember. The member us-gaap:LeaseholdImprovementsMember should not be used with the FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis hs it is expected to represent a tangible asset. Please change the member to represent an intangible asset or change the axis to represent a tangible asset. i.e. PropertyPlantAndEquipmentByTypeAxis.
Concept : VIVK:PropertyPlantAndEquipmentsEstimatedUsefulLives Value : Lesser of the lease term or estimated useful life Period : 2025-01-01 to 2025-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis=us-gaap:LeaseholdImprovementsMember
Rule Element Id:10705 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - vivakor_10k.htm 13272

property.name: label
property.value: property, plant and equipment, estimated useful lives

property.name: value
property.value: Lesser of the lease term or estimated useful life

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0204.10705] The concept us-gaap:PropertyPlantAndEquipmentUsefulLife with a value of P3Y has been used with the axis FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis and the member us-gaap:MachineryAndEquipmentMember. The member us-gaap:MachineryAndEquipmentMember should not be used with the FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis hs it is expected to represent a tangible asset. Please change the member to represent an intangible asset or change the axis to represent a tangible asset. i.e. PropertyPlantAndEquipmentByTypeAxis.
Concept : us-gaap:PropertyPlantAndEquipmentUsefulLife Value : P3Y Period : 2025-12-31 Dimensions : srt:RangeAxis=srt:MinimumMember, us-gaap:FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis=us-gaap:MachineryAndEquipmentMember
Rule Element Id:10705 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - vivakor_10k.htm 13248

property.name: label
property.value: Property, plant and equipment, useful life

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0204.10705] The concept us-gaap:PropertyPlantAndEquipmentUsefulLife with a value of P5Y has been used with the axis FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis and the member us-gaap:FurnitureAndFixturesMember. The member us-gaap:FurnitureAndFixturesMember should not be used with the FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis hs it is expected to represent a tangible asset. Please change the member to represent an intangible asset or change the axis to represent a tangible asset. i.e. PropertyPlantAndEquipmentByTypeAxis.
Concept : us-gaap:PropertyPlantAndEquipmentUsefulLife Value : P5Y Period : 2025-12-31 Dimensions : srt:RangeAxis=srt:MinimumMember, us-gaap:FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis=us-gaap:FurnitureAndFixturesMember
Rule Element Id:10705 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - vivakor_10k.htm 13256

property.name: label
property.value: Property, plant and equipment, useful life

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0204.10705] The concept us-gaap:PropertyPlantAndEquipmentUsefulLife with a value of P5Y has been used with the axis FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis and the member us-gaap:VehiclesMember. The member us-gaap:VehiclesMember should not be used with the FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis hs it is expected to represent a tangible asset. Please change the member to represent an intangible asset or change the axis to represent a tangible asset. i.e. PropertyPlantAndEquipmentByTypeAxis.

The member us-gaap:VehiclesMember should not be used with the FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis hs it is expected to represent a tangible asset. Please change the member to represent an intangible asset or change the axis to represent a tangible asset. i.e. PropertyPlantAndEquipmentByTypeAxis.

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0204.10705] The concept us-gaap:PropertyPlantAndEquipmentUsefulLife with a value of P10Y has been used with the axis FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis and the member us-gaap:FurnitureAndFixturesMember. The member us-gaap:FurnitureAndFixturesMember should not be used with the FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis hs it is expected to represent a tangible asset. Please change the member to represent an intangible asset or change the axis to represent a tangible asset. i.e. PropertyPlantAndEquipmentByTypeAxis.

The member us-gaap:MachineryAndEquipmentMember should not be used with the FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis hs it is expected to represent a tangible asset. Please change the member to represent an intangible asset or change the axis to represent a tangible asset. i.e. PropertyPlantAndEquipmentByTypeAxis.
